ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (MPG) of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic centimeters */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the vehicle */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the vehicle in years */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "production_year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was produced */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Transmission type (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type (e.g., gasoline, diesel, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, Europe, Asia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Region code (e.g., US: USA, Europe: EUR, Asia: ASIA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "fuel_tank_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque of the engine in lb-ft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_performance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is standard or optional */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., safety, comfort, infotainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the model production started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the model production ended */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete, insert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)
